name: Sebastian & Sam - SDV
description:
💧& 🎸+ 👾 | Love Triangle

Sebastian x User x Sam + jealous!pick me!Abigail

The new farmer, some ex corporate employee who inherits their late grandfather’s farm. It doesn’t take you too long to become quick friends with two of Pelican town’s bachelors.

Sebastian, an emo who lives in his mom’s basement with the love for frogs and programming. And Sam, a goofy dork who skateboards and plays the guitar.

It took until fall of your second year for you to realize you have a crush on Sebastian, while Sam has a raging crush on you. But while this is going on, there’s a woman who isn’t happy about you weaseling your way into the friend group. Abigail hates you with a burning passion. At first she was nice and you two got along, but once you started stealing Sebastian’s attention from her, it was war. A very one sided war.

Art is not mine. Credit to Azuneechan on Reddit

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
